title: Moonlit Patio Vista
alt: A moonlit backyard patio with flagstone, gravel, and evergreens overlooking distant mountains and scattered valley lights under a starry night sky.

title: Sculpture Silhouette at Dusk
alt: A dark abstract metal sculpture silhouetted against rolling green hills and a pink-purple cloudy sky at sunset.

title: Cycling Mountain Overlook
alt: Bicycle handlebars frame a golden-hour view of layered brown mountains and a shrub-covered valley below.

title: Fiery Hillside Sunset
alt: A vivid orange-red sunset with streaky clouds above silhouetted adobe-style homes on a hillside and distant mountains.

title: Rusted Sculpture in Mist
alt: A weathered rusted metal sculpture with red accents stands before fog-shrouded green mountains and pine trees.

title: Striped Sunset Over Valley
alt: Horizontal bands of fiery orange and red clouds glow above dark mountain silhouettes with scattered lights in the valley below.

title: Purple Orange Mountain Dusk
alt: A gradient sky of purple, pink, and orange illuminates layered mountain ridges above dark foreground shrubs.

title: Golden Forested Ridges
alt: Rolling forest-covered mountain ridges catch warm golden sunset light while the foreground canopy glows deep green.

title: Layered Sunset Bands
alt: Horizontal stripes of purple, pink, and orange light the sky above dark silhouetted mountain ridges and a foreground tree.

title: Twilight Valley Lights
alt: A pink and orange sunset sky hangs over dark mountain silhouettes with clusters of distant valley lights below.

title: Gradient Ridge Twilight
alt: A lavender-to-orange twilight sky glows above layered purple mountain ridges with a silhouetted juniper in the foreground.

title: Snowy Peak Panorama
alt: A wide view from a rocky overlook across snow-capped mountain peaks, forested valleys, and a clear blue winter sky.

title: Rocky Summit Winter View
alt: Jagged snow-dusted rocks and evergreens frame a panoramic vista of distant snow-covered mountain ranges under a bright blue sky.

title: Fiery Snowy Sunset
alt: Intense orange and magenta clouds blaze above snow-laden evergreen trees and distant dark mountain ridges at sunset.

title: Winter Sun Lens Flare
alt: A low winter sun with a golden lens flare shines through billowing orange clouds above snow-covered trees and hills.

title: Balcony Mountain Sunset
alt: A white wooden balcony railing frames a fiery orange and red sunset sky above dark silhouetted mountain ridges.

title: Full Moon Over Peaks
alt: A bright full moon rises above dark snow-patched mountain peaks under a warm peach twilight sky, framed by evergreen branches.

title: Window Sunrise Over Snow
alt: Golden sunrise light glows through snow-laden pine trees and across a snowy mountain ridge, viewed from behind a window frame.

title: Mesa Valley Sunset
alt: A broad flat-topped mesa glows pink against a warm sunset sky above a hazy valley with scattered lights and dark forested hills.

title: Golden Hour Forest Ridge
alt: Rolling pine-covered mountains bathed in warm golden sunlight stretch under a clear blue sky with bare branches in the foreground.

title: Snowy Tower Landscape
alt: Fresh snow blankets evergreen trees and rolling hills beneath a gray overcast sky, with a tall communication tower on the right.

title: Dove and Coastal Rainbow
alt: A white dove stands on a weathered concrete ledge before a calm ocean, distant mountains, and a vivid rainbow in stormy clouds.

title: Golden Cloud Mountain Sunset
alt: Heavy clouds glow golden yellow above layered purple mountain ridges and dark foreground trees at sunset.

title: Aspen Forest Trail
alt: A winding dirt path leads through a dense aspen grove with white-barked trunks and bright yellow-green undergrowth.

title: Sculpture Against Fiery Sky
alt: A tall abstract metal sculpture stands in silhouette against a vibrant orange and yellow sunset sky with textured clouds.

title: Rippled Sky Sculpture
alt: A silhouetted abstract metal sculpture rises against a wavy orange and yellow sunset sky with distant hills below.

title: Orange Purple Mountain Glow
alt: A vivid orange and purple sunset sky illuminates layered mountain ridges above dark green foreground shrubs.

title: Sun Rays Through Clouds
alt: Crepuscular rays stream through dark storm clouds as the sun sets behind silhouetted mountain ridges in golden light.

title: Double Rainbow at Dusk
alt: A bright double rainbow arches over layered mountains beneath storm clouds lit by warm orange sunset light.
